creator: phaedrus@alltel.net
text:
Reproducible on KDE3.0_1 with Konq 3.0.0.  No backtrace available.

1) Open Konqi with homepage (zephyr.unl.edu)
2) Window -> Show Terminal Emulator
3) ls -l ( just to make sure the term emul works, also reproducible w/o this 
step)
4) # exit
5) crash...no more Konqi...no backtrace (debugging not compiled, yet).

However, closing the Terminal Emulator by the toggling the Window-> Show 
Terminal Emulator menu does *not* cause Konqi to crash.

drc
-- 
Dave Cantrell		| Contrary to popular belief, UNIX is User Friendly.
phaedrus@alltel.net	| It's just choosy with whom it makes friends.  
Lincoln, Nebraska, USA	| And currently we have only a nodding acquaintance.
